nasb.text: Yet I will leave 7,000 in Israel, all the knees that have not bowed to Baal and every mouth that has not kissed him.”

esv.text: Yet I will leave seven thousand in Israel, all the knees that have not bowed to Baal, and every mouth that has not kissed him.”

cnv.text: 但我在以色列人中留下七千人，他們全是未曾向巴力屈過膝的，也未曾與巴力親過嘴的。”

ccb.text: 此外，我在以色列留下七千人，他们未曾跪拜巴力，也未曾亲吻巴力。”
